arts.ttl: New face spotted in Barcelona first-team training
arts.sum: An up-and-coming member of the goalkeeper ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was recently called up to first-team training for the very first time. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who…

arts.ttl: Wantaway Barcelona star to fix big Arsenal problem as 'contact made'
arts.sum: Inaki Pena is looking to get out of Barcelona, presenting Arsenal with a brilliant solution to the goalkeeper problem that will arise in the summer. The 23-year-old has been brilliant for the Barcelona-based side since usurping the No.1 shirt last season, but the North London club were unable to strike a deal.

arts.ttl: Team News: Barcelona vs. Benfica injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Barcelona and Benfica.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star responds to claims of wife’s infidelity
arts.sum: Barcelona star Marc-André ter Stegen has on Monday released a statement, denying recent claims in the media surrounding his wife’s infidelity. The name of goalkeeper Ter Stegen has proven a…

arts.ttl: The one doubt in Barcelona’s XI to face Benfica
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has one doubt when it comes to his starting XI for the club’s next outing. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who point towards as much…

arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Benfica: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for Champions League
arts.sum: Hansi Flick faces key selection dilemma for last-16 second-leg tie on home soil

arts.ttl: ‘He could have a chance’ - Hansi Flick talks Raphinha’s Ballon d’Or chances
arts.sum: The Brazilian will be a real contender for the Ballon d’Or if Barça go on to win the Champions League and maybe add the La Liga and/or the Copa del Rey to their trophy cabinet this season, and Hansi Flick was asked about Raphinha’s chances of winning the award in a press conference on Monday. If Raphinha has any chance to win the Ballon d’Or this season, you can credit a large part of that to Hansi Flick.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides Robert Lewandowski injury update before Barcelona vs Benfica
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has provided an update on the wellbeing of star attacker Robert Lewandowski. This comes amid confirmation that the Pole was recently forced to deal with…

arts.ttl: Flick: Barcelona has focused and prepared for Champions League game after doctor's death
arts.sum: Barcelona has been able to focus on preparing for its Champions League return match against Benfica after the death of team doctor Carles Miñarro, coach Hansi Flick said on Monday. Flick said Miñarro played a big part in the team’s success and the players were in mourning.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick declares Barcelona star as a contender for the Ballon d’Or
arts.sum: As we start making our way toward the end of another season, most people have a good idea of who have been the standout performers during this campaign. With this…
